sr_v0.2.3.description:
This is a fix for my boneheaded mistake in packaging the APWorld, as well as adding manifest files for future-proofing.

The documentation has been updated as well. If this is your first time, be sure to read...
- [The Player's guide](/worlds/sonicriders/docs/en_Sonic%20Riders.md)
- [The Setup Guide](/worlds/sonicriders/docs/setup_en.md)

Have fun!
sr_v0.2.3.title: Sonic Riders v0.2.3 Hotfix
